name: rung_130_fuzzy_tail_soft_retract_language
utterances: Moe is a parent of Noa.
Noa is a parent of Pia.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
scratch that middle link please: parent(noa, pia).
Ria has Noa as a parent.
Is Moe an ancestor of Pia now?
